title: Hut 8 shares rise as company secures $9.8B AI data center lease at Beacon Point campus
excerpt: Hut 8 Mining Corp (TSX:HUT, Unlisted (US):HUTMF) shares climbed nearly 12% on Monday after the company announced a second long-term lease agreement for its B...
content_html:
Hut 8 Mining Corp (TSX:HUT, Unlisted (US):HUTMF) shares climbed nearly 12% on Monday after the company announced a second long-term lease agreement for its Beacon Point AI data center campus in Texas, fully commercializing the 1-gigawatt facility and increasing its contracted data center portfolio.

The company announced a 15-year lease agreement covering 352 megawatts (MW) of IT capacity with the same high-investment-grade tenant that signed the first phase lease at the campus. The agreement carries a base-term contract value of $9.8 billion and brings the tenant's total contracted capacity at Beacon Point to 704 MW.

With the transaction, Hut 8's total contracted AI data center capacity rises to 949 MW across its portfolio, supported by 1,330 MW of utility capacity. The company reported aggregate base-term contract value of $26.6 billion and average annual net operating income of more than $1.75 billion across its contracted AI data center assets.

The Beacon Point campus, located in Nueces County, Texas, is secured by a 1,000 MW utility interconnection agreement with AEP Texas. Hut 8 said the second lease fully commercializes the campus, with the full 1,000 MW capacity now contracted under two 15-year agreements.

The second phase lease will support the development of another 352 MW AI factory designed around Nvidia's DSX reference architecture for large-scale AI infrastructure. Hut 8 expects initial Phase 2 data hall delivery in the second quarter of 2028.

The company expects the second lease to contribute $9.8 billion in cumulative net operating income over the base term, or approximately $655 million annually once stabilized. Including both phases, Hut 8 expects the full Beacon Point campus to generate $1.31 billion in average annual NOI.

Hut 8 noted that three five-year renewal options under each lease could increase potential campus-level contract value to $50.2 billion if fully exercised.

"The real test of our power-first approach is what our partners are willing to commit against it," Asher Genoot, CEO of Hut 8, said.

"Our tenant at Beacon Point chose to double its footprint at the site, the strongest validation an asset can receive. We took this greenfield site from first lease to full commercialization in just months," he said.  

"That speaks to the quality of the sites we originate, the credibility of our delivery, and the long-term orientation of our partnerships. The opportunity ahead of us is to apply the same model across our development pipeline."

The company also highlighted its "power-first" development approach, which involves securing energy capacity before building data center infrastructure. Hut 8 said the Beacon Point project was initially developed around speed-to-power opportunities before being converted into a fully contracted AI data center campus.

Construction activity is underway at the site, with long-lead equipment procured and initial energization still expected in the first quarter of 2027, according to the company.

content_html_zh:
Hut 8 Mining Corp（多伦多证券交易所代码：HUT，非上市（美国）：HUTMF）周一股价上涨近 12%，此前该公司宣布为其位于德克萨斯州的 Beacon Point AI 数据中心园区签订第二份长期租赁协议，将 1 吉瓦设施完全商业化，并增加其合同数据中心投资组合。

该公司宣布与在园区签署第一阶段租赁的同一家高投资级租户签订为期 15 年的租赁协议，涵盖 352 兆瓦 (MW) 的 IT 容量。 该协议的基本合同价值为 98 亿美元，使 Beacon Point 租户的总合同容量达到 704 兆瓦。

通过此次交易，Hut 8 整个投资组合的人工智能数据中心合同总容量将增至 949 兆瓦，并得到 1,330 兆瓦公用事业容量的支持。 该公司报告称，其合同人工智能数据中心资产的基本期限合同总价值为 266 亿美元，平均年净营业收入超过 17.5 亿美元。

Beacon Point 园区位于德克萨斯州纽埃塞斯县，与 AEP Texas 签订了 1,000 MW 公用事业互连协议。 Hut 8 表示，第二份租约使该园区完全商业化，目前已根据两份为期 15 年的协议签订了 1,000 兆瓦的全部装机容量。

第二阶段租赁将支持另一个 352 MW 人工智能工厂的开发，该工厂围绕 Nvidia 的 DSX 参考架构设计，用于大规模人工智能基础设施。 Hut 8 预计第 2 阶段数据大厅将于 2028 年第二季度交付。

该公司预计第二项租赁将在基准期内贡献 98 亿美元的累计净营业收入，稳定后每年贡献约 6.55 亿美元。 包括这两个阶段在内，Hut 8 预计整个 Beacon Point 园区的年平均 NOI 将达到 13.1 亿美元。

Hut 8 指出，每项租约下的三个五年期续约选择权如果全部行使，可能会将校园级的潜在合同价值增加到 502 亿美元。

Hut 8 首席执行官 Asher Genoot 表示：“对我们权力优先方法的真正考验是我们的合作伙伴愿意做出什么承诺。”

“我们 Beacon Point 的租户选择将其占地面积增加一倍，这是资产可以获得的最强有力的验证。 我们在短短几个月内就把这个绿地从首次租赁到完全商业化，”他说。

“这说明了我们创建的网站的质量、我们交付的可信度以及我们合作伙伴关系的长期方向。 我们面临的机会是在我们的开发流程中应用相同的模型。”

该公司还强调了其“电力优先”的开发方法，其中包括在建设数据中心基础设施之前确保能源容量。 Hut 8 表示，Beacon Point 项目最初是围绕速度发电机会开发的，后来被转变为完全承包的人工智能数据中心园区。

该公司表示，现场施工活动正在进行，采购了长周期设备，预计仍将在 2027 年第一季度实现初步通电。
